text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh, the beach! ☆ Isn't the sparkling sand just
wonderful, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
It's like being on a fancy vacation! Y'know, like,
Dubai vibes! ☆ Or something like that!
choice_data_list: We're still very much in Japan, though!
We're still very much in Japan, though!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
...Um, could someone please explain what is
happening?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Shouldn't I be training? What of my schedule?
And why is Falcon here?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I beseech you... Please explain what this
is all about!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
There's nothing like a taking a vacation to let off
some steam! Like living it up in Dubai! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taking Smart Falcon's advice, I arranged a trip
to... a relatively close beach since Dubai wasn't
really an option.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Well, I used Umadol ☆ Power to bring you all this
way! ♪

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
...Umadol Power? Is that what you call the
extreme manhandling you gave me?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Aw, you gotta let bygones be bygones! You're
here now, so enjoy yourself!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
We can have cute drinks, or laze around on the
beach... Oh, suntanning isn't an option, though.
Skin damage is a no-go for an Umadol like me!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I appreciate the thought. Honestly, I am touched
you'd do this for me.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
However... I can't afford to frolic on the beach
right now. I must return to my training at once—

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Nuh-uh. You're not going anywhere.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Falcon?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I mean, I can tell you've been in a really bad
place lately.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
You used to come home at the same time every
day, but now there's no telling when you'll be
back... And you're always rushing around every
waking minute.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: It's like you can't do what you really wanna do.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
You always support me with anything and
everything I want to do...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: So I started wondering if there's anything I could do for you.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Falcon...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
And there is! There's something I definitely can
do! After all, I'm an Umadol!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: And Umadols can brighten anyone's day! ☆ If you hang out with me, you're guaranteed to feel better!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: ...That is the most illogical reasoning ever.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
But it's true! ☆ So just forget about everything for
today and live it up with me!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
C'mon! If we just start walking, I bet we'll find
something to do eventually! Any ol' direction will
work, so let's—

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Are you telling me you have no set plan?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Um...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Tell me what you wish to do other than relax on
the beach.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I'll look into the nearby tourist locations and
create the perfect plan for us.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
You're awesome, Flash! I'll leave it to you,
then! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with that, we slowly get into vacation mode
together.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Oh, wow! That church is huuuge.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It seems they are holding an exhibition on the
historical stained glass windows inside. Would
you like to see it?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: You bet! ...Hehe! ♪

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Hm? Why are you laughing?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I was just thinking that I managed to find
something you like. ☆

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
And that makes you happy? You are truly an odd
one.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Then, around the time Eishin Flash starts to
relax...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Phew... I'm stuffed... Ugh, the heartburn...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I told you not to add extra whipped cream to
your order...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Aww, come on. It's not like you don't have a big
sweet tooth too.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I do. That is why I didn't add extra cream, so I
could savor my dessert without suffering
heartburn.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
But don't you secretly wanna try absolutely
smothering your dessert in the stuff?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
In my youth, I once made myself very sick by
doing so. Never again.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: You really are amazing, Flash...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: ...How do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I always, always pile an entire mountain of
whipped cream on my pancakes, and I always
regret it afterwards.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I stay up too late using my phone and oversleep,
flunk my tests, and never finish my homework. I
know it's bad, but I still do all that. Hehe...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
But not you, Flash. You find a goal, make a plan,
and see it through to the end.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
You learn from all your mistakes and never
hesitate on your path. You always march straight
on forward.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
That's why I think you should just go for it and do
what you want! ♪ I know you can accomplish
anything you set your mind to!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Whether or not the race is worthy of my pride as
a racer. In other words, G1 races—races that only
the best in the world can run.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
This is the most optimal race schedule I can
devise for myself.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: No, I...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon's earnest words of encouragement
ring true and clearly move Eishin Flash. Now
might be my chance...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: What is it?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: ...Pardon?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I have changed clothes... but are you truly serious
about this?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I cannot understand. A human stands no chance
against an Umamusume in a race.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Well, you are racing on sand instead of turf, so who knows? Do your best, Trainer! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Ready? On your marks, get set...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The race is settled as soon as it starts.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Are you all right, Trainer?
choice_data_list: I lost by a hundred lengths...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
That's an exaggeration. Now, would you please
explain why you asked to race me?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Why did you ever make such a foolish
proposition?
choice_data_list: You don't seem happy you won.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Naturally. What joy is there in defeating such an
easy opponent?
choice_data_list: But that's exactly what you proposed.
But that's exactly what you proposed.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
choice_data_list:
There's no pride in winning after fleeing from a
challenge.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The perfect schedule is designed for victories that
have meaning because they offer a challenge.
There's no point in winning just because you can.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
More specifically, it's utterly pointless for Eishin
Flash. She's worked so hard for so long to get to
this point. What she needs right now is to...
choice_data_list: Win a race that you want to win.
Win a race that you want to win.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
choice_data_list: Don't you want to win in the G1?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I... do. I want to compete at a high level... and be
victorious.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I, too, believe there is pride to be had in
accomplishing such an achievement.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
But... what meaning is there in taking on a
challenge that may be impossible to overcome?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Is it so strange that I would rather change my
plans so I can win in front of my parents?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At last, Eishin Flash confesses her true feelings. If
only there was something I could do to help her
get over this fear of failure...

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Where your running leads you is up to you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: In that case...
